title: Registration Deadline Reminder
transcript: This is a reminder for all students that the registration deadline for spring semester courses is this Friday, February 10th at midnight. After this date, a late registration fee of fifty dollars will be applied. Students who have not yet registered are encouraged to meet with their academic advisors as soon as possible. Course schedules can be viewed and updated through the student portal. Waitlisted courses will be released to new registrants after the deadline. Payment for tuition must be completed by February 20th to secure your schedule.

questions.explanation: The announcement states the registration deadline is this Friday, February 10th at midnight.

questions.stem: What will happen to waitlisted courses after the deadline?
options: They will be canceled for the semester
They will be released to new registrants
They will require special permission to join
They will be moved to the next semester
questions.explanation: Waitlisted courses will be released to new registrants after the deadline.
